name: Chicken or Veal Francese
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the cutlets thin and pound them to tenderize (except for fish, just slice thin).
2. Melt butter in a pan and heat to medium. Dip the cutlets in flour, then egg.
3. Sauté the cutlets on both sides until golden. Remove from the pan and place on a warm serving platter to keep warm.
4. Add bouillion, water, and lemon juice to the pan. Raise the heat and cook until reduced by half.
5. Add lemon juice and cook for 2 more minutes. Stir in parsley and mix well.
6. Pour over the cooked cutlets and serve immediately with lemon wedges for garnish.
